commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Did not Achan the son of Zerah commit a trespass in the accursed thing, and wrath fell on all the congregation of Israel. and that man perished not alone in his iniquity. Hebrew, "he did not expire in his sin "(Calmet) but repented; (Haydock) or, Did he not. The Septuagint, "he did not alone die in his sin. "Chaldean, "but this man alone did not die in his transgression. "(Calmet) All Israel was in consternation, and 36 were slain. If this secret offence was so severely punished, what judgments will not the public apostacy of so many thousands draw down upon our heads.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
